label: Ashmark Scriptorium
description: Ashmark Scriptorium serves as a licensed workshop for the preparation of durable inks, seal-wax, and stamped paper used in Cindervale’s chartered trade and oath-bound filings. Blackened brick walls and riveted iron braces reflect the city’s repaired ancient masonry, while a stone hearth and hooded flue keep fumes contained under ordinance. Workbenches are set beneath barred clerestory slits, and a row of lockable cabinets bears standardized tally-niches for pigments, matrices, and custodial blanks. A posted slate of penalties and quarantine marks formalizes interdictions against liminal contamination in materials destined for the vaults and toll-stones.
